enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks -
Transfer and Distribution of Credit Risk) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: Bank of India (Small Finance Banks - Transfer and Distribution of Credit Risk) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall come into effect on the day it is placed on the official website
of the Reserve Bank of India.
enriched_requirements.object: the day it is placed on the official website of the Reserve Bank of India

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These directions shall be applicable to Small Finance Banks (hereinafter collectively
referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank').
enriched_requirements.object: Finance Banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that Small Finance Banks are permitted for purchase of portfolios of loans
classified as standard assets only from banks and Non-Banking Financial Companies
(NBFCs) for the specific purpose of meeting the sub-targets within the 40% Priority
Sector Lending (PSL) target as applicable to commercial banks.
enriched_requirements.object: permitted for purchase of portfolios of loans classified as standard assets only from banks and Non-Banking Financial Companie

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All other expressions, unless defined in the respective parts, shall have the
same meaning as have been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act,
1949 or the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934 or any statutory modification or re-
enactment thereto or any other relevant regulation or as used in commercial parlance,
as the case may be.
enriched_requirements.object: as have been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934 or any statutory mod

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Banks shall acquire loans only from a transferor specified as a lender in
paragraph 12(4) unless specifically permitted.
enriched_requirements.object: a transferor specified as a lender in paragraph 12(4) unless specifically permitted

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
No bank shall undertake any loan transfers or acquisitions other than those
permitted under Part A of this direction and in the manner prescribed therein.
enriched_requirements.object: or acquisitions other than those permitted under Part A of this direction and in the manner prescribed therein

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: The above proviso shall be without prejudice to the provisions of Reserve
Bank of India (Small Finance Banks - Securitisation Transactions) Directions, 2025;
enriched_requirements.object: the provisions of Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks - Securitisation Transactions) Directions, 2025

conditions: Provided that in cases of loan transfers other than loan participation
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that in cases of loan transfers other than loan participation, legal ownership
of the loan shall be mandatorily transferred to the transferee(s) to the extent of
economic interest transferred.
enriched_requirements.object: the transferee(s) to the extent of economic interest transferred

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These directions shall apply only to SFBs as transferor(s) or transferee(s) in
loan transfers, unless specifically made applicable to other categories of entities as
transferee(s) as per the specific permissions as per paragraphs 58 and 62.
enriched_requirements.object: as transferor(s) or transferee(s) in loan transfers

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In respect of transferee(s) other than lenders mentioned in paragraph 12(4) and
Asset Reconstruction Companies (ARCs), which are also financial sector entities, the
prudential norms, including asset classification and provisioning post the transfer shall
be as per the respective regulatory frameworks laid down by the respective financial
sectoral regulators, viz., Securities and Exchange Board of India, Insurance
enriched_requirements.object: respective regulatory frameworks laid down by the respective financial sectoral regulators, viz

conditions: Provided that Regional Rural Banks
enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Provided that Regional Rural Banks;

conditions: if any, under the transfer agreement
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
(5) "loan participation" means a transaction through which the transferor transfers
all or part of its economic interest in a loan exposure to transferee(s) without the actual
transfer of the loan contract, and the transferee(s) fund the transferor to the extent of
the economic interest transferred which may be equal to the principal, interest, fees
and other payments, if any, under the transfer agreement;
enriched_requirements.object: principal, interest, fees and other payments

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that the transfer of economic interest under a loan participation shall only be
through a contractual transfer agreement between the transferor and transferee(s) with
the transferor remaining as the lender on record.
enriched_requirements.object: contractual transfer agreement between the transferor and transferee(s) with the transferor remaining as the lender on record

conditions: in case of loan participation
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided further that in case of loan participation, the exposure of the transferee(s)
shall be to the underlying borrower and not to the transferor.
enriched_requirements.object: borrower and not to the transferor

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Accordingly, the transferor
and transferee(s) shall maintain capital according to the exposure to the underlying
borrower calculated based on the economic interest held by each post such transfer.
enriched_requirements.object: the exposure to the underlying borrower calculated based on the economic interest held by each post such transfer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The applicable prudential norms, including the provisioning requirements, post the
transfer, shall be based on the above exposure treatment and the consequent
outstanding.
enriched_requirements.object: above exposure treatment and the consequent outstanding
before the same is transferred to transferee(s)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(7) "net book value (NBV)" means the funded outstanding in a loan exposure
reduced by the specific provisions made against such exposure;
enriched_requirements.object: a loan exposure reduced by the specific provisions made against such exposure

conditions:
if it falls within the purview
of the above definition
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: A loan shall be categorised as personal loan if it falls within the purview
of the above definition, even if such loans are not explicitly classified so in any
regulatory / supervisory reporting.
enriched_requirements.object: loan if it falls within the purview of the above definition, even if such loans are not explicitly classified so in any reg

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(10) "portfolio" means a set of loan exposures transferred together at a point of time
under the same transfer agreement;
enriched_requirements.object: exposures transferred together at a point of time under the same transfer agreement

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: Consequently, the transferee(s) shall "acquire" the loan exposures
following a loan transfer.
enriched_requirements.object: following a loan transfer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(14) "transferee" means the entity to which the economic interest in a loan exposure
is transferred under Part A of these directions;
enriched_requirements.object: the economic interest in a loan exposure is transferred under Part A of these directions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that a transferee shall not be a person disqualified in terms of Section 29A
of the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016;
enriched_requirements.object: in terms of Section 29A of the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016

conditions:
in case of transfer of loan exposures of borrowers in whose
accounts instances of fraud have been detected by any lender
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided further that in case of transfer of loan exposures of borrowers in whose
accounts instances of fraud have been detected by any lender, the transferee(s) shall
neither belong to the existing promoter group of such borrower nor shall be a
subsidiary / associate / related party etc.
enriched_requirements.object: existing promoter group of such borrower nor shall be a subsidiary / associate / related party etc

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation I: In market parlance, transferee may be alternatively referred to as the
assignee under assignment transactions and participant under loan participations,
wherever applicable.
enriched_requirements.object: as the assignee under assignment transactions and participant under loan participations
as in the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Issue of Capital and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2018

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and the term 'related
party' shall have the same meaning as in the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016.
enriched_requirements.object: as in the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation III: The responsibility for verifying and establishing that the transferee(s)
comply with the above provisos shall be with the transferor(s).

Explanation: In market parlance, transferor may be alternatively referred to as the
assignor under assignment transactions and grantor under loan participations,
wherever applicable.
enriched_requirements.object: as the assignor under assignment transactions and grantor under loan participations

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall put in place a comprehensive Board approved policy for transfer
and acquisition of loan exposures under these guidelines.
enriched_requirements.object: comprehensive Board approved policy for transfer and acquisition of loan exposures under these guidelines

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These guidelines must, inter
alia, lay down the minimum quantitative and qualitative standards relating to due
diligence, valuation, requisite IT systems for capture, storage and management of
data, risk management, periodic Board level oversight, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: down the minimum quantitative and qualitative standards relating to due diligence, valuation, requisite IT systems for capture, stor

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the policy must
also ensure independence of functioning and reporting responsibilities of the units and
personnel involved in transfer / acquisition of loans from that of personnel involved in
originating the loans.
enriched_requirements.object: functioning and reporting responsibilities of the units and personnel involved in transfer / acquisition of loans from tha

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All transactions must meet the requirements as detailed in the
policy.
enriched_requirements.object: detailed in the policy

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Loan transfers should result in transfer of economic interest without being
accompanied by any change in underlying terms and conditions of the loan contract.
enriched_requirements.object: economic interest without being accompanied by any change in underlying terms and conditions of the loan contract

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
in take-out financing), the same shall be evaluated
against restructuring as defined in Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks -
Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: as defined in Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In such cases, the roles and responsibilities of the transferor and
transferee(s) shall be clearly delineated contractually.

Lenders referred to in paragraph 12(4), regardless of whether they are
transferors or otherwise, should not offer credit enhancements or liquidity facilities in
any form in the case of loan transfers.
enriched_requirements.object: liquidity facilities in any form in the case of loan transfers

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A loan transfer should result in immediate separation of the transferor from the
risks and rewards associated with loans to the extent that the economic interest has
been transferred.
enriched_requirements.object: of the transferor from the risks and rewards associated with loans to the extent that the economic interest has been tr

conditions: In case of any retained economic interest in the exposure by the transferor
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
In case of any retained economic interest in the exposure by the transferor, the loan
transfer agreement should clearly specify the distribution of the principal and interest
income from the transferred loan between the transferor and the transferee(s).
enriched_requirements.object: of the principal and interest income from the transferred loan between the transferor and the transferee(s)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, it is reiterated that any retention of economic interest by the transferor must
not result in credit enhancement.

The transferee(s) should have the unfettered right to transfer or otherwise
dispose of the loans free of any restraining condition to the extent of economic interest
transferred to them.
enriched_requirements.object: to transfer or otherwise dispose of the loans free of any restraining condition to the extent of economic interest transferr

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(1) The transferee(s) shall have no recourse to the transferor for any expenses or
losses linked to the transferred economic interest except those specifically permitted
under these guidelines.
enriched_requirements.object: the transferor for any expenses or losses linked to the transferred economic interest except those specifically permitted under th

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Further, the transferor / transferee(s) shall not be constrained to obtain consent
from the transferee(s) / transferor, as the case may be, when it comes to resolution or
recovery in respect of the beneficial economic interest retained by or transferred to the
respective entity.
enriched_requirements.object: consent from the transferee(s) / transferor, as the case may be

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The transferor shall have no obligation to re-acquire or fund the re-payment of
the loans or any part of it or substitute loans held by the transferee(s) or provide
additional loans to the transferee(s) at any time except those arising out of breach of
warranties or representations made at the time of transfer.
enriched_requirements.object: re-acquire or fund the re-payment of the loans or any part of it or substitute loans held by the transferee(s) or provide additi

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The transferor should be able to demonstrate that a notice to this effect has been given
to the transferee(s) and that the transferee(s) have acknowledged the absence of such
obligation.
enriched_requirements.object: that a notice to this effect has been given to the transferee(s) and that the transferee(s) have acknowledged the absence of su

conditions: if the need arises
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Wherever security interest is held by the transferor in trust with the transferee(s)
as the beneficiaries, the transferee(s) shall ensure that a mutually agreed and binding
mechanism for timely invocation of such security interest, if the need arises, has been
properly documented and put in place.
enriched_requirements.object: agreed and binding mechanism for timely invocation of such security interest

conditions: where necessary as per the respective contracts
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The transfer of loans by transferor(s) must not contravene the rights of
underlying obligors and all necessary consents from obligors (including from third
parties), where necessary as per the respective contracts, should have been obtained.
enriched_requirements.object: underlying obligors and all necessary consents from obligors (including from third parties)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Any rescheduling, restructuring or re-negotiation of the terms of the underlying
agreement/s attempted by permitted transferee(s) after the transfer of assets to the
<image>
transferee(s) shall be as per the provisions of the Reserve Bank of India (Small
Finance Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: provisions of the Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A transferor should notify RBI (Department of Supervision) of all instances
where it has replaced loans transferred to a transferee or paid damages arising out of
any representation or warranty.
enriched_requirements.object: Supervision) of all instances where it has replaced loans transferred to a transferee or paid damages arising out of any rep

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For domestic transactions, transferee(s) should ensure that the transferor has
strictly adhered to the MHP criteria in respect of loans acquired by them, as prescribed
in Chapter III of Part A of these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: has strictly adhered to the MHP criteria in respect of loans acquired by them, as prescribed in Chapter III of Part A of th

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The extant instructions on outsourcing and the applicable provisions of Reserve
Bank of India (Small Finance Banks - Know Your Customer) Directions, 2025 shall be
complied with in all cases.
enriched_requirements.object: all cases

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In respect of exposures that do not meet the requirements of these directions,
transferee(s) shall maintain capital charge equal to the actual exposure acquired.
enriched_requirements.object: to the actual exposure acquired

conditions: if it was not transferred at all in the first place
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In
such cases, the transferor shall continue to recognise the transferred loan in its
entirety, as if it was not transferred at all in the first place, and the consideration
received shall be recognised as an advance.
enriched_requirements.object: transferred loan in its entirety, as if it was not transferred at all in the first place, and the consideration received sha

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The transferee(s) may engage a servicing facility provider, which may also be
the transferor, to administer or service the acquired exposures.
enriched_requirements.object: provider, which may also be the transferor, to administer or service the acquired exposures

conditions: If a bank
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If a bank, including a transferor, performs the role of a servicing facility provider
for the transferee(s) after the loan transfer has occurred, it shall ensure that the
following conditions are fulfilled:
(1) The nature, purpose, extent of the facility and all required standards of
performance shall be clearly specified in a written agreement.
enriched_requirements.object: conditions are fulfilled: (1) The nature, purpose, extent of the facility and all required standards of performance shall be

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(5) There should not be any recourse to the lender beyond the fixed contractual
obligations.
enriched_requirements.object: the lender beyond the fixed contractual obligations

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(7) The bank should be under no obligation to remit funds to the transferee(s) until
it has received funds generated from the underlying loans.
enriched_requirements.object: to remit funds to the transferee(s) until it has received funds generated from the underlying loans

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(8) The bank shall hold in trust, on behalf of the transferee(s), the cash flows arising
from the underlying loans and shall avoid co-mingling of these cash flows with its own
cash flows.
enriched_requirements.object: behalf of the transferee(s), the cash flows arising from the underlying loans and shall avoid co-mingling of these cash flows with i

conditions: Provided that if the above conditions are not satisfied
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that if the above conditions are not satisfied, the transferor bank shall
maintain capital on the loans transferred as if the loans in respect of which servicing
facility is being provided are held by it directly on its books.
enriched_requirements.object: loans transferred as if the loans in respect of which servicing facility is being provided are held by it directly on its book

conditions: If a transfer involves multiple transferees

if any of the transferees is unable to perform due
diligence at the individual loan level
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Chapter III-Transfer of Loans which are not in default
Explanation 1: If a transfer involves multiple transferees, the minimum retention
requirement by the transferor, if any of the transferees is unable to perform due
diligence at the individual loan level, shall be on the entire amount of transferred loans,
including the portions transferred to transferees who are able to perform due diligence
at the individual loan level.
enriched_requirements.object: amount of transferred loans, including the portions transferred to transferees who are able to perform due diligence at the individua

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The action may,
inter alia, include modification to exposure ceilings in respect of certain types of asset
classes, change in ceilings applicable to transferor, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: modification to exposure ceilings in respect of certain types of asset classes, change in ceilings applicable to transferor, etc

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For this purpose, transferee(s)
should put in place formal policies and procedures appropriate to and commensurate
with the risk profile of the loans acquired.
enriched_requirements.object: policies and procedures appropriate to and commensurate with the risk profile of the loans acquired

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Such procedures should be as rigorous as
that followed by them for portfolios of similar loans directly originated by them.
enriched_requirements.object: that followed by them for portfolios of similar loans directly originated by them

conditions:
if not collected directly by the banks and
obtained from the servicing facility agent
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The
information required for these procedures, if not collected directly by the banks and
obtained from the servicing facility agent, if any, should be certified by the authorized
officials of the servicing facility agent.
enriched_requirements.object: authorized officials of the servicing facility agent

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Depending upon the size of the portfolio, credit monitoring procedures may
include verification of the information submitted by the servicing facility agent's
concurrent and internal auditors.
enriched_requirements.object: information submitted by the servicing facility agent's concurrent and internal auditors

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(1) The servicing facility agreement should provide for such verifications by the
auditors of the transferee(s), and wherever applicable, the transferor.
enriched_requirements.object: by the auditors of the transferee(s), and wherever applicable, the transferor

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The transactions referred to in Paragraph 31 above shall be governed by the
respective regulatory frameworks as contained in Part B of these directions.
enriched_requirements.object: respective regulatory frameworks as contained in Part B of these directions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However,
in all such cases, the provisions of Chapter II shall continue to apply except in cases
where the respective regulatory framework (as contained in Part B of these directions)
provides for otherwise.
enriched_requirements.object: in cases where the respective regulatory framework (as contained in Part B of these directions) provides for otherwise

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
SFBs should formulate a board approved policy to ensure that the gap between
time of transfer and due-diligence cut-off date should be minimal and no loans in
default is transferred under provisions of this Chapter.
enriched_requirements.object: policy to ensure that the gap between time of transfer and due-diligence cut-off date should be minimal and no loans in def

conditions:
where loan transfers result in a change of lender of record under a
loan agreement
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In cases where loan transfers result in a change of lender of record under a
loan agreement, the transferor and transferee(s) should ensure that the existing loan
agreement has suitable enabling provisions including consent by the underlying
borrower that allow for such transactions by laying down the required ground rules.
enriched_requirements.object: loan agreement has suitable enabling provisions including consent by the underlying borrower that allow for such transactions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Transferor's retention of economic interest, if any, in the loans transferred
should be supported by legally valid documentation.
enriched_requirements.object: valid documentation
record by the transferor: (1) legal validity of amount of economic interest retained by the transferor

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
There shall not be any difference in the criteria for credit underwriting applied
by the transferor to exposures transferred and those held or retained on their book.
enriched_requirements.object: the criteria for credit underwriting applied by the transferor to exposures transferred and those held or retained on their book

conditions: where relevant
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
To
this end, similar processes for approving and, where relevant, amending, renewing
and monitoring of credit facilities extended should be applied by the transferor for all
the loan exposures originated by it.
enriched_requirements.object: transferor for all the loan exposures originated by it

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The transfer shall be only on cash basis and the consideration shall be received
not later than at the time of transfer of loans.
enriched_requirements.object: basis and the consideration shall be received not later than at the time of transfer of loans

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of this paragraph shall be
without derogation of the provisions of paragraph 18, which pertains to retained
economic interest.
enriched_requirements.object: the provisions of paragraph 18, which pertains to retained economic interest

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(1) The transfer consideration should be arrived at in a transparent manner on an
arm's length basis.
enriched_requirements.object: a transparent manner on an arm's length basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The due diligence in respect of the loans cannot be outsourced by the
transferee(s) and should be carried out by its own staff with the same rigour and as
per the same policies as would have been done for originating any loan.
enriched_requirements.object: its own staff with the same rigour and as per the same policies as would have been done for originating any loan

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The above due diligence requirements shall be applicable at the level of each
loan.
enriched_requirements.object: level of each loan

conditions: In case of loans acquired as a portfolio
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of loans acquired as a portfolio, if a transferee is unable to perform due
diligence at the individual loan level for the entire portfolio but can perform due
diligence at the individual loan level for not less than one-third of the portfolio by value
and number of loans in the portfolio, then due diligence may be performed at the
portfolio level for the remaining, and the transferor has to retain at least 10 per cent of
economic interest in the transferred loans.
enriched_requirements.object: portfolio level for the remaining, and the transferor has to retain at least 10 per cent of economic interest in the transferred l

conditions:
in case of loans where security does not exist or security cannot be
registered with CERSAI
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that in case of loans where security does not exist or security cannot be
registered with CERSAI, the MHP shall be calculated from the date of first repayment
of the loan.
enriched_requirements.object: date of first repayment of the loan

conditions: in case of transfer of project loans
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided further that in case of transfer of project loans, the MHP shall be calculated
from the date of commencement of commercial operations of the project being
financed.
enriched_requirements.object: date of commencement of commercial operations of the project being financed

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(i) The residual maturity of such receivables, at the time of transfer, should not
be more than 90 days, and
enriched_requirements.object: days, and

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Any loss or profit arising because of transfer of loans, which is realised, should
be accounted for accordingly and reflected in the Profit & Loss account of the transferor
for the accounting period during which the transfer is completed.
enriched_requirements.object: and reflected in the Profit & Loss account of the transferor for the accounting period during which the transfer is compl

conditions: if any, arising out of such transfers
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, unrealised
profits, if any, arising out of such transfers, shall be deducted from CET 1 capital for
meeting regulatory capital adequacy requirements till the maturity of such loans.
enriched_requirements.object: 1 capital for meeting regulatory capital adequacy requirements till the maturity of such loans

conditions: In case of transfer of a pool of loans
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of transfer of a pool of loans, the transferee(s), and the transferor(s) in
case of retention of economic interest, should maintain borrower-wise accounts.

However, such external rating shall be done ex-
post the transferee(s)' due diligence and such rating cannot substitute for the due
diligence that the transferee(s) are required to perform.
enriched_requirements.object: the transferee(s)' due diligence and such rating cannot substitute for the due diligence that the transferee(s) are required to perfo

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The transferee(s), as well as transferor(s) shall apply the extant income
recognition, asset classification and provisioning as well as exposure norms, on
individual obligor basis in all cases to the extent of retained economic interest.
enriched_requirements.object: recognition, asset classification and provisioning as well as exposure norms, on individual obligor basis in all cases to the

conditions: In case of pool of loans acquired
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of pool of loans acquired, transferee(s) should put in place mechanisms
to enable application of relevant prudential norms on individual obligor basis.
enriched_requirements.object: to enable application of relevant prudential norms on individual obligor basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Such
mechanisms may also include relying on the details obtained from the servicing facility
provider.
enriched_requirements.object: the details obtained from the servicing facility provider

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, such mechanisms must provide for adequate checks by the
transferee(s)' concurrent auditors, internal auditors and statutory auditors.
enriched_requirements.object: by the transferee(s)' concurrent auditors, internal auditors and statutory auditors

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All relevant
information and audit reports should be available for verification by the supervisors
from RBI during supervision of the transferee(s).
enriched_requirements.object: by the supervisors from RBI during supervision of the transferee(s)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For permitted transferees, the acquired loans will be carried at acquisition cost
unless it is more than the outstanding principal at the time of the transfer, in which
case the premium paid, should be amortised based on straight line method or effective
<image>
interest rate method, as considered appropriate by the individual permitted transferee.
enriched_requirements.object: straight line method or effective <image> interest rate method, as considered appropriate by the individual permitted transferee

conditions:
if any, requiring a transferor to
replace loans (or any parts thereof) transferred
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) The exercise of a representation or warranty, if any, requiring a transferor to
replace loans (or any parts thereof) transferred, on grounds covered in the
representation or warranty, must be:

conditions: Provided that upon such replacement
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that upon such replacement, the transferor shall apply the asset classification
and provisioning norms as if the reacquired exposures had not been transferred in the
first place.
enriched_requirements.object: and provisioning norms as if the reacquired exposures had not been transferred in the first place

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(5) A transferor that is required to pay damages for breach of representation or
warranty can do so provided the agreement to pay damages meets the following
conditions:
enriched_requirements.object: breach of representation or warranty can do so provided the agreement to pay damages meets the following conditions:

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The transfer of stressed loans must be done through assignment or novation
only;
enriched_requirements.object: or novation only
the following aspects: (1) Norms and procedure for transfer of such loans

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The policy on transfer of stressed loans shall be based on the following
principles:
(1) The process of identification of stressed loans beyond a specified value, as may
be determined by a bank's policy, for transfer shall follow a top-down approach i.e.,
the head office/corporate office of the bank shall be actively involved in identification
of stressed loans for transfer;
enriched_requirements.object: following principles: (1) The process of identification of stressed loans beyond a specified value, as may be determined by a bank's p

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) At a minimum, all loans classified as NPA above a threshold amount decided
by the Board/Board Committee shall be reviewed by the Board/Board Committee at
periodic intervals and a view, with documented rationale, be taken on transfer or
otherwise.
enriched_requirements.object: Board/Board Committee at periodic intervals and a view, with documented rationale, be taken on transfer or otherwise

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The loans identified for transfer shall be listed for the purpose of transfer as
indicated above.
enriched_requirements.object: purpose of transfer as indicated above

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Transferors should have clear policies with regard to valuation of loan
exposures proposed to be transferred.
enriched_requirements.object: regard to valuation of loan exposures proposed to be transferred

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The basis or the grounds which will determine
the type of valuation used - internal or external - must be clearly specified in the policy.
enriched_requirements.object: the policy

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The discount rate used by the transferor in the internal valuation exercise shall also be
spelt out in the policy.
enriched_requirements.object: in the policy

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
This may be either cost of equity or average cost of funds or
<image>
opportunity cost or some other relevant rate, subject to a floor of the contracted interest
rate charged.
enriched_requirements.object: equity or average cost of funds or <image> opportunity cost or some other relevant rate

conditions:
in case the credit exposure being transferred (without netting
for provisions)
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, in case the credit exposure being transferred (without netting
for provisions), singly, jointly, or severally, is ₹100 crore or more, the transferor shall
obtain two external valuation reports.
enriched_requirements.object: reports

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The cost of valuation exercise, external or
otherwise, shall be borne by the transferor.
enriched_requirements.object: transferor

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In general, bank shall transfer stressed loans, including through bilateral sales,
only to permitted transferees and ARCs.
enriched_requirements.object: through bilateral sales, only to permitted transferees and ARCs

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The manner of transfer must be in terms of the Board approved policy of the
transferor.
enriched_requirements.object: the Board approved policy of the transferor

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Banks may also use e-auction platforms, wherever available, for
transferring their loans.

conditions: when negotiated on a bilateral basis
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, when negotiated on a bilateral basis, such negotiations must
necessarily be followed by an auction through Swiss Challenge method if the
aggregate exposure (including investment exposure) of lenders to the borrower/s
whose loan is being transferred is ₹100 crore or more.
enriched_requirements.object: an auction through Swiss Challenge method if the aggregate exposure (including investment exposure) of lenders to the borro

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In all other cases, the bilateral
negotiations shall be subject to the price discovery and value maximisation
approaches adopted by the transferor as part of the Board approved policy described
in Paragraph 55, which may also include Swiss Challenge method.
enriched_requirements.object: price discovery and value maximisation approaches adopted by the transferor as part of the Board approved policy described in Paragr

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that in case of transfer of stressed loans undertaken as a resolution plan
under the Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks - Resolution of Stressed
Assets) Directions, 2025 with the approval of signatories to the intercreditor agreement
(ICA) representing 75 per cent by value of total outstanding credit facilities (fund based
as well non-fund based) and 60 per cent of signatories by number, for the exit of all
signatories to the ICA from the stressed loan exposure, Swiss Challenge method
would be mandatory irrespective of the above exposure threshold.
enriched_requirements.object: of stressed loans undertaken as a resolution plan under the Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks - Resolution of Stressed As

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The transferor shall ensure that subsequent to transfer of the stressed loans,
they do not assume any operational, legal or any other type of risks relating to the
transferred loans including additional funding or commitments to the borrower /
transferee(s) with reference to the loan transferred.
enriched_requirements.object: transfer of the stressed loans, they do not assume any operational, legal or any other type of risks relating to the transfe

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Subsequently, fresh exposure may
be taken on the borrower after a cooling period laid down in the respective Board
<image>
approved policy of the transferor, which in any case, shall not be less than 12 months
from the date of such transfer.
enriched_requirements.object: months from the date of such transfer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Acquisition of loan exposures
by such companies shall be subject to the relevant provisions of the Companies Act,
2013.
enriched_requirements.object: relevant provisions of the Companies Act, 2013

conditions: In case such transferee(s) are neither ARC nor permitted transferee
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) In case such transferee(s) are neither ARC nor permitted transferee, the
transfer shall be additionally subject to the following conditions:
enriched_requirements.object: the following conditions:

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(i) The transferee entity should be incorporated in India or registered with a
financial sector regulator in India (Securities and Exchange Board of India,
Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority of India, Pension Fund
Regulatory and Development Authority, and International Financial Services
Centers Authority).
enriched_requirements.object: or registered with a financial sector regulator in India (Securities and Exchange Board of India, Insurance Regulatory and De

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) The transferee(s) should not be classified as a non-performing account (NPA)
by any lending institution at the time of such transfer;
enriched_requirements.object: non-performing account (NPA) by any lending institution at the time of such transfer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iii) The transferee(s) should not fund the loan acquisition through loans from
lenders specified at Paragraph 12(4).
enriched_requirements.object: through loans from lenders specified at Paragraph 12(4)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iv) The lenders specified at Paragraph 12(4) should not take any credit/investment
exposure apart from working capital facilities (which are not in the nature of term
loans) to the borrower whose loan account is transferred, for at least three years
from the date of such transfer.
enriched_requirements.object: apart from working capital facilities (which are not in the nature of term loans) to the borrower whose loan accou

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that the working capital facilities are sanctioned by the banks which
are not transferors.
enriched_requirements.object: are sanctioned by the banks which are not transferors

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(v) Further, for at least three years from the date of such transfer, the lenders
specified at Paragraph 12(4) should not take any credit/investment exposure to
the transferee(s) for deployment, either directly or indirectly, into the operations
of the borrower.
enriched_requirements.object: to the transferee(s) for deployment, either directly or indirectly, into the operations of the borrower

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For this purpose, borrower shall mean the legal entities to which
the transferor(s) had exposure which was transferred to the transferee(s) as a
enriched_requirements.object: to which the transferor(s) had exposure which was transferred to the transferee(s) as a

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
part of the resolution plan, and may include, but is not limited to, a special
purpose vehicle having a legal-entity status set up for a project.
enriched_requirements.object: limited to, a special purpose vehicle having a legal-entity status set up for a project

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The respective financial sector regulators shall put in place a
framework for this purpose in consultation with the Reserve Bank.
enriched_requirements.object: framework for this purpose in consultation with the Reserve Bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The transferor(s) must provide adequate time for due diligence by prospective
acquirers, which may vary as per the size of the loan.
enriched_requirements.object: due diligence by prospective acquirers, which may vary as per the size of the loan

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The loan transfer agreement shall clearly specify that in the event an ICA is
required to be signed in terms of the Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks -
Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025, the transferee shall sign the ICA as
and when required.
enriched_requirements.object: the event an ICA is required to be signed in terms of the Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks - Resolution of Stressed

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The transferor(s) shall ensure that no transfer of a stressed loan is made at a
contingent price whereby in the event of shortfall in the realization of the agreed price,
the transferor(s) would have to bear a part of the shortfall.
enriched_requirements.object: of a stressed loan is made at a contingent price whereby in the event of shortfall in the realization of the agreed price, the

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The transferor shall transfer the stressed loans to transferee(s) other than ARCs
only on cash basis.
enriched_requirements.object: to transferee(s) other than ARCs only on cash basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The entire transfer consideration should be received not later than
enriched_requirements.object: than

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The transferor shall continue to pursue the staff accountability aspects as per
the existing instructions in respect of the NPAs transferred to other lenders.
enriched_requirements.object: staff accountability aspects as per the existing instructions in respect of the NPAs transferred to other lenders

conditions:
provided that the responsibilities of the
transferor with respect to continuous reporting
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
This shall include loan exposures
classified as fraud as on the date of transfer provided that the responsibilities of the
transferor with respect to continuous reporting, monitoring, filing of complaints with law
enforcement agencies and proceedings related to such complaints shall also be
transferred to the ARC.
enriched_requirements.object: as fraud as on the date of transfer provided that the responsibilities of the transferor with respect to continuous

conditions: In case of specific stressed loans
where it is considered necessary
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of specific stressed loans, where it is considered necessary,
transferor(s) shall be free to enter into agreement with the ARC to share, in an agreed
proportion, any surplus realised by the ARC from the concerned stressed loan.
enriched_requirements.object: into agreement with the ARC to share, in an agreed proportion, any surplus realised by the ARC from the concerned stressed loan

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In such
cases, the terms of transfer should provide for a report from the ARC to the
transferor(s) on the value realised from the loan.
enriched_requirements.object: from the ARC to the transferor(s) on the value realised from the loan

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Transferor(s) shall not account for
the profit until it has materialised.
enriched_requirements.object: until it has materialised

conditions:
When the stressed loan is transferred to ARC at a price below the NBV at the
time of transfer
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
When the stressed loan is transferred to ARC at a price below the NBV at the
time of transfer, bank shall debit the shortfall to the profit and loss account for the year
in which the transfer has taken place.
enriched_requirements.object: the profit and loss account for the year in which the transfer has taken place

conditions:
when the stressed loan is transferred to an ARC for a value
higher than the NBV at the time of transfer
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
On the other hand, when the stressed loan is transferred to an ARC for a value
higher than the NBV at the time of transfer, bank shall reverse the excess provision on
transfer to the profit and loss account in the year the amounts are received and only
when the sum of cash received by way of initial consideration and / or redemption or
transfer of Security Receipts (SR) / Pass Through Certificates (PTCs)/ other securities
issued by ARCs is higher than the NBV of the loan at the time of transfer.
enriched_requirements.object: on transfer to the profit and loss account in the year the amounts are received and only when the sum of cash received by

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further,
such reversal shall be limited to the extent to which cash received exceeds the NBV
of the loan at the time of transfer.
enriched_requirements.object: extent to which cash received exceeds the NBV of the loan at the time of transfer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Provided that, the non-cash component of the excess provision [viz.
enriched_requirements.object: of the excess provision [viz

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
excess provision
(-) cash received at the time of transfer] shall be deducted from CET 1 capital, and no
dividends shall be paid out of this component.
enriched_requirements.object: 1 capital, and no dividends shall be paid out of this component

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Investments by lenders in SRs / PTCs / other securities issued by ARCs shall
be valued periodically by reckoning the Net Asset Value (NAV) declared by the ARC
based on the recovery ratings received for such instruments.
enriched_requirements.object: reckoning the Net Asset Value (NAV) declared by the ARC based on the recovery ratings received for such instruments

conditions:
when transferors invest in the SRs/PTCs issued by ARCs in respect of
the stressed loans transferred by them to the ARC
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that when transferors invest in the SRs/PTCs issued by ARCs in respect of
the stressed loans transferred by them to the ARC, the transferors shall carry the
investment in their books on an ongoing basis, until its transfer or realization, at lower
of the redemption value of SRs arrived based on the NAV as above, and the NBV of
the transferred stressed loan at the time of transfer.
enriched_requirements.object: their books on an ongoing basis, until its transfer or realization, at lower of the redemption value of SRs arrived based on t

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If the investment by the transferor in SRs issued against loans transferred by it
is more than 10 percent of all SRs issued against the transferred asset, then the
valuation of the SRs on the books of the transferor shall be the lower of the following:
(1) value arrived at in terms of paragraph 73;
enriched_requirements.object: the following: (1) value arrived at in terms of paragraph 73

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(1) Notwithstanding the provisions contained in paragraph 74, or the proviso to
paragraph 73, SRs guaranteed by the Government of India shall be valued periodically
by reckoning the Net Asset Value (NAV) declared by the ARC based on the recovery
ratings received for such instruments.
enriched_requirements.object: reckoning the Net Asset Value (NAV) declared by the ARC based on the recovery ratings received for such instruments

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) However, any unrealized gain recognized in the Profit and Loss Account on
account of fair valuation of such investments shall be deducted from CET 1 capital,
and no dividends shall be paid out of such unrealized gains.
enriched_requirements.object: 1 capital, and no dividends shall be paid out of such unrealized gains

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) Any SRs outstanding after the final settlement of the government guarantee or
the expiry of the guarantee period, whichever is earlier, shall be valued at ₹1.

(4) In the event of the SRs being converted to any other form of instruments as part
of resolution, then the valuation and provisioning thereof, for such instruments shall be
governed by the provisions as laid down under the Reserve Bank of India (Small
Finance Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: provisions as laid down under the Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
SRs/PTCs which are not redeemed as at the end of the resolution period (i.e.,
five years or eight years as the case may be) shall be treated as loss asset in books
of the lender and fully provided for.
enriched_requirements.object: asset in books of the lender and fully provided for

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The valuation, classification and other norms applicable to investment in non-
SLR instruments prescribed by RBI from time to time shall be applicable to lender's
investment in debentures/ bonds/ SRs /PTCs issued by ARC.
enriched_requirements.object: investment in debentures/ bonds/ SRs /PTCs issued by ARC

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, if any of the
above instruments issued by ARC is limited to the actual realisation of the financial
assets assigned to the instruments in the concerned scheme, the bank shall reckon
the NAV obtained from ARC from time to time, for valuation of such investments.
enriched_requirements.object: from ARC from time to time, for valuation of such investments

conditions:
Where stressed loans are taken over by ARCs as agents for recovery in
exchange for a fee
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Where stressed loans are taken over by ARCs as agents for recovery in
exchange for a fee, the loans will not be removed from the books of the transferors but
realisations as and when received shall be credited to the loan accounts.
enriched_requirements.object: loan accounts

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The
transferors shall continue making provisions for the loan in the normal course.
enriched_requirements.object: the loan in the normal course

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Subject to the requirements under Paragraph 60, the bank shall put in place a
board approved policy on adoption of Swiss Challenge Method for transfer of their
stressed loans.
enriched_requirements.object: board approved policy on adoption of Swiss Challenge Method for transfer of their stressed loans

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
(1) The policy should specify the conditions under which bank(s) may opt for Swiss
Challenge method, which could be based on parameters such as a tolerance limit for
extent of haircut required by the lender(s) in the base-bid (as specified in Paragraph
82), for instance, or any objective parameter identified by the bank(s)' Board.
enriched_requirements.object: method, which could be based on parameters such as a tolerance limit for extent of haircut required by the lender(s) in the ba

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The policy should also specify the minimum mark-up over the base-bid required
for the challenger bid (as specified in Paragraph 82) to be considered by the bank(s),
which in any case, shall not be less than five per cent and shall not be more than 15
per cent.
enriched_requirements.object: per cent and shall not be more than 15 per cent

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For this purpose, mark-up shall be the difference between the challenger bid
and the base-bid expressed as a percentage of the base-bid.
enriched_requirements.object: the challenger bid and the base-bid expressed as a percentage of the base-bid

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of transfer of stressed loans undertaken as a resolution plan under
the Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets)
Directions, 2025 with the approval of signatories to the ICA, the minimum mark-up
over the base-bid required for the challenger bid to be considered by the lenders
specified at paragraph 12(4) above, shall be decided with the approval of signatories
to the ICA representing 75 per cent by value of total outstanding credit facilities (fund
based as well non-fund based) and 60 per cent of signatories by number.
enriched_requirements.object: approval of signatories to the ICA representing 75 per cent by value of total outstanding credit facilities (fund based as well no

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
On an ongoing basis, the bank should identify the stressed loans which will be
offered for transfer and an authenticated list of such loans shall be maintained by the
lenders.
enriched_requirements.object: lenders

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The list may, at the discretion of the lender, be disclosed to prospective bidder
on entering into confidentiality agreement.
enriched_requirements.object: of the lender, be disclosed to prospective bidder on entering into confidentiality agreement

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The broad contours of the Swiss Challenge Method are as under:
(1) A prospective transferee interested in acquiring a specific stressed loan may
offer a bid to the bank(s), which shall be termed as the base-bid.
enriched_requirements.object: base-bid

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The bank(s) shall then publicly call for counter bids from other prospective
buyers, on comparable terms, by disclosing the essential elements of the base-bid and
also clearly specifying the minimum mark-up (as specified in Paragraph 79) that would
be acceptable.
enriched_requirements.object: counter bids from other prospective buyers, on comparable terms, by disclosing the essential elements of the base-bid and also

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
else, the challenger
bid shall be the winning bid.

The banks should be guided by Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks -
Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) Directions, 2025 for all disclosure
related requirements.
enriched_requirements.object: Bank of India (Small Finance Banks - Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) Directions, 2025 for all disclosure rela

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Banks shall report each loan transfer transaction undertaken under these
directions to a trade reporting platform as notified by the Reserve Bank.
enriched_requirements.object: transaction undertaken under these directions to a trade reporting platform as notified by the Reserve Bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In anticipation of the same, bank
shall maintain a database of loan transfer transactions with adequate MIS concerning
each transaction till the reporting platform is notified and the related instructions are
issued.
enriched_requirements.object: loan transfer transactions with adequate MIS concerning each transaction till the reporting platform is notified and the relate

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The banks may evolve appropriate mechanism for adopting sole bank, multiple
bank, consortium or syndication approach, by framing necessary ground rules on
operational aspects.
enriched_requirements.object: adopting sole bank, multiple bank, consortium or syndication approach, by framing necessary ground rules on operation

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Banks shall strengthen its information back-up about the
borrowers enjoying credit facilities from multiple lenders as under:
(1) At the time of granting fresh facilities, bank shall obtain declaration from the
borrowers about the credit facilities already enjoyed by them from other lenders in the
format specified in Annex I.
enriched_requirements.object: about the borrowers enjoying credit facilities from multiple lenders as under: (1) At the time of granting fresh fa

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In the case of existing banks, all the banks shall seek a
declaration from their existing borrowers availing sanctioned limits of rupees five crore
and above or wherever, it is in their knowledge that their borrowers are availing credit
facilities from other lenders and introduce a system of exchange of information with
other lenders as indicated above.
enriched_requirements.object: their existing borrowers availing sanctioned limits of rupees five crore and above or wherever, it is in their knowledge that

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Subsequently, banks shall exchange information about the conduct of the
borrowers' accounts with other lenders (participating REs under consortium/ Multiple
Banking Arrangements) in the format given in Annex II at least at quarterly intervals.
enriched_requirements.object: conduct of the borrowers' accounts with other lenders (participating REs under consortium/ Multiple Banking Arrangement

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The bank shall obtain regular certification by a professional, preferably a
Company Secretary / Cost Accountant / Chartered Accountant regarding compliance
of various statutory prescriptions that are in vogue as per the format specified in Annex
III.
enriched_requirements.object: a professional, preferably a Company Secretary / Cost Accountant / Chartered Accountant regarding compliance of variou

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) Further, the bank shall make greater use of credit reports available from
Credit Information Companies listed under Reserve Bank of India (Credit Information
Companies) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: credit reports available from Credit Information Companies listed under Reserve Bank of India (Credit Information Companies) Direc

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(5) The bank shall also incorporate suitable clauses in the loan agreements in
future (at the time of next renewal in the case of existing facilities) regarding exchange
of credit information so as to address confidentiality issues.
enriched_requirements.object: in the loan agreements in future (at the time of next renewal in the case of existing facilities) regarding exchange

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the consortium leader / bank having the largest exposure shall have
the lead role in monitoring the unhedged foreign exchange exposure of entities.
enriched_requirements.object: in monitoring the unhedged foreign exchange exposure of entities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
There shall be two categories of Participations namely Inter-Bank Participations
with Risk Sharing and Inter-Bank Participations without Risk Sharing.
enriched_requirements.object: Participations namely Inter-Bank Participations with Risk Sharing and Inter-Bank Participations without Risk Sharing

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The aggregate amount of such Participations in
any account should not exceed 40 per cent of the outstanding in the account at the
time of issue.
enriched_requirements.object: of the outstanding in the account at the time of issue

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, during the currency of the Participations the aggregate amount
of Participations should be covered by the outstanding balance in the account.
enriched_requirements.object: outstanding balance in the account

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Period of Participation: The minimum period of such a Participation shall be 91
days, while the maximum period shall be 180 days.
enriched_requirements.object: the maximum period shall be 180 days

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Transferability: Participations shall not be transferable.

Documentation: A bank should subscribe to the "uniform code for
Participations" prepared by IBA which will spell out clearly their inter-se rights and
obligations in relation to the securities covered by the advances in question.
enriched_requirements.object: code for Participations" prepared by IBA which will spell out clearly their inter-se rights and obligations in relation to t

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The participating bank shall show the aggregate
amount of such Participations as part of its advances.
enriched_requirements.object: of such Participations as part of its advances

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
There shall be no privity of contract between the borrower and the participating bank
and to avoid any difficulty, bank will incorporate in the cash credit agreement of the
borrowers an appropriate clause permitting the lending bank to shift a part of the
advance to any bank, without notice to the borrowers, by way of Participations.
enriched_requirements.object: contract between the borrower and the participating bank and to avoid any difficulty, bank will incorporate in the cash credit agreem

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The
agreement may also provide that in the event of issue of Participations the issuing
bank would continue to represent the participating bank in protecting the latter's
interests.
enriched_requirements.object: the event of issue of Participations the issuing bank would continue to represent the participating bank in protecting the latter

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Period of Participation: The tenure of such Participations shall not exceed 90
days.
Transferability: Participation shall not be transferable.

Accounting: The issuing bank will show the amount of Participations as
borrowing while the participating bank shall show the same under Advances to bank
i.e.
enriched_requirements.object: Advances to bank i

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Reporting of Data: As a result of outstanding Participations being treated as
borrowings, the issuing bank should report such borrowings in the fortnightly return
under Section 42(2) of the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934.
enriched_requirements.object: the fortnightly return under Section 42(2) of the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The same shall be done
by including the amount of Participations, by the issuing bank under 'Borrowings from
banks' i.e.
enriched_requirements.object: the amount of Participations, by the issuing bank under 'Borrowings from banks' i

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The participating bank should include the amount of
Participations taken in advances to banks under item III(c) in Form 'A'.
enriched_requirements.object: Participations taken in advances to banks under item III(c) in Form 'A'

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The amount of
Participations so included in the relative items of Form 'A' should be clearly indicated
<image>
as a foot-note to the return, showing separately also Participations on risk sharing
basis.
enriched_requirements.object: as a foot-note to the return, showing separately also Participations on risk sharing basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The banks shall put in place a Board approved policy with regard to take-over
of accounts from another bank at the request/instance of the borrower.
enriched_requirements.object: Board approved policy with regard to take-over of accounts from another bank at the request/instance of the borrower

conditions: in case of quick mortality of such cases after takeover
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The policy may
include norms relating to the nature of the accounts that may be taken over, authority
levels for sanction of takeover, reporting of takeovers to higher authorities, monitoring
mechanism of taken over accounts, credit audit of taken over accounts, examination
of staff accountability especially in case of quick mortality of such cases after takeover,
periodic review of taken over accounts at Board/ Board Committee level, Top
Management level, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: the nature of the accounts that may be taken over, authority levels for sanction of takeover, reporting of takeovers to high

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Before taking over an account, the transferee bank should obtain necessary
credit information from the transferor bank as per the format prescribed in Annex II.
enriched_requirements.object: from the transferor bank as per the format prescribed in Annex II

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The transferor bank, on
receipt of a request from the transferee bank, should share necessary credit
information as per the prescribed format at the earliest.
enriched_requirements.object: as per the prescribed format at the earliest

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Directions,
instructions and guidelines repealed prior to the issuance shall continue to remain
repealed.

Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to
be governed by the provisions thereof.
enriched_requirements.object: by the provisions thereof

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted
under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: by these Directions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further,
the repeal of these directions, instructions, or guidelines shall not in any way
prejudicially affect:
(1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder;
enriched_requirements.object: affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

conditions: if those directions
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may
be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or
punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or
guidelines had not been repealed.
enriched_requirements.object: enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being
in force.
enriched_requirements.object: and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

conditions: if it considers necessary
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in
<image>
respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of these
Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.

of contracts where the positive MTM value due to the bank remained overdue for more than 90 days and the account had to be classified as NPA ( but later on regularized and is not NPA as on the date of exchange of information)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
As Banks quite often deal with unlisted companies, disclosure
requirements for such companies above a specific turnover shall be
made akin to those for listed companies, viz.
